description: Construct and join a Jitsi Meet room named 'VirtualBootcamp2024' using configuration overrides to ensure the meeting starts with audio muted, video muted, and the subject 'Morning Bootcamp - Advanced Level'. Use the hash parameters config.startWithAudioMuted=true, config.startWithVideoMuted=true, and config.subject="Morning Bootcamp - Advanced Level". Save the full constructed URL to /home/ga/meeting_url.txt, create a configuration report at /home/ga/meeting_config_report.txt confirming the parameter effects, and save a screenshot of the joined meeting to /home/ga/meeting_configured.png.
